summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FightJudge Pro Phase 4 - All 6 new major modules tested successfully. Backend APIs: 34/34 tests passed (100% success rate). Frontend: All Phase 4 features working, sidebar collapsible sections functional, all previous features still working.
